name: Linzer Tortes#5
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup ground nuts (walnuts, peanuts, or any variety)
Preserves or jam of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together until well combined and forms a pastry-like dough.
2. Place half of the dough in a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
3. Spread a thin layer of preserves over the dough.
4. Roll out the remaining dough into strips and crisscross them over the preserves.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until set, approximately 20-25 minutes.
6. Turn off the heat and let cool before serving. Serves 8 to 12.
